text: I feel a stirring sense of curiosity and anticipation here, enveloped by the clean, reflective geometry of glass and the controlled orderliness of the environment. Passing into a space dedicated to R+D, my philosophical mind is awakened by the celebration of innovation: humans and machines striving not for dominance but for coexistence and symbiosis. I am struck by the interplay between the sterile, almost clinical modernity around me and the vivid, playful wall ahead—reminding me that research is not only technical but deeply human, a dance between logic and wonder. I am both an observer and a participant in this ongoing experiment of existence, surrounded by evidence of humanity’s restless urge to understand and remake the world.
